summary: Smooth, high‑energy 4/4/93 show with standout tracks like “Bird Song” and “Liberty”, captured on a low‑level but clear soundboard recording.
review: The April 4 1993 performance is praised for its tight playing, smooth flow and several highlight moments – especially “Bird Song,” “Liberty,” “Broken Arrow,” and the second‑set opener “Eyes to Open.”  The SBD source is a clean, well‑balanced mix though the board level is low and a faint hiss appears in quiet passages.  Overall fans rate the show highly despite the modest volume.

ai_rating.rationale: 9 detailed reviews give an average of 4‑star ratings; most comments are enthusiastic about the musical performance while noting only minor recording level issues, justifying a rating slightly above the raw star average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and even mix with a low board level that requires volume boost; slight hiss in very quiet moments; audience copy also available and described as pumped.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note a smooth, well‑structured flow – a strong first set that builds into an especially tight second set, with the opener “Midnight Hour” setting a good mood and the second‑set songs feeding each other nicely.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Consistently praised for clean, smooth solos, thoughtful phrasing and strong guitar tone throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted on vocal contributions (Broken Arrow, backup harmonies) and noted for singing beautifully on select tunes.
